data.name: Furry Shades of Gay 3: Still Gayer
data.detailed_description:
🍆If you like guys...and the girls too!🍑


關於此遊戲

Furry Shades of Gay 3: Still Gayer延續了之前Furry帥哥們互相墜入愛河的傳奇，這裡有新的故事，新的角色，和其他的新東西！

性愛場景將會更加火辣，伴隨著更長，也更多樣的動畫。每一次深入淺出的翻雲覆雨將會更有表現力，我們的動畫師對此打包票。而這也將是系列中首次所有的動畫都擁有了配音與音效。

謎題的引擎也迎來了又一次升級。新的目標，新的困難，與新的主題關卡等待著你！擊破所有的目標，你也將會看到你喜歡的角色擊破對方的心防！

Percy 和 Blake 想要找到一個只屬於他們的小愛巢。在看房子的時候，他們偶然注意到一間維多利亞時代的老房子，並決定仔細去看看。出乎意料，他們一進房子，房門就在背後鎖上了，因此他們只能邁入更深的神秘之中……怎麼說鬼魂都是不存在的，是這樣吧？

假期還剩幾天，而Alex自己在房間裡都閒的長草了。意大利經常讓他想起Valentino 和他們在大學時代擦出的火花。說走就走，Alex打通了電話並踏上了他火辣的意大利之旅。

Hugo 是個拖延症晚期患者。上班的時候他一直在用手機跟一個超級性感，且喜歡他的屁股到了崇拜地步的陌生人聊天。但要是他的老闆William發現了怎麼辦？他不會把Hugo開除吧？

炎炎夏日即將過去，童子軍的夏令營輪班也快要結束了。 Connor感傷於如白駒過隙的時光，而且他好像……對Dan有意思？可是Dan也是男生啊……不過他似乎不像Connor那麼在乎。至於Connor，他還在嘗試理清思緒。

Millennial Maiki 患上了當代年輕人通病 - 腰酸背疼。不幸的是，他的按摩師Adela今天請假了。不過她承諾幫他想辦法解決他的緊急狀況。看來她的“辦法”已經敲響了Maiki的房門，來從僵硬的肌肉中拯救他了。

埃文已經很久沒有踏進蛇坑 BDSM 俱樂部的門檻了。 在過去的幾個月裡，他與主人蛇的關係發生了很大的變化，不再是簡單的專業關係。 情人節即將來臨......他們能否坦白彼此的關係已經變得更加親密？

遊戲特色：

  • 五個新的，更加基情的故事。

  • 超過六十張原創畫作。

  • 更長的性愛場景並擁有配音與音效

  • 分支化敘事，更難的選項，和會弄得邋裡邋遢的獎品。

  • 新版的三消遊戲，擁有著新的目標與特色。

  • 五個新的，更加基情的故事。

  • 超過六十張原創畫作。

  • 更長的性愛場景並擁有配音與音效

  • 分支化敘事，更難的選項，和會弄得邋裡邋遢的獎品。

  • 新版的三消遊戲，擁有著新的目標與特色。
data.short_description: Furry Shades of Gay 3 是一系列激情滿滿的且帶有三消元素的視覺小說遊戲!你將會邂逅新的故事，新朋（和舊友！）和新的，更加多樣的三消關卡。體驗每一個故事，探索每一條分支，解鎖整整15段帶配音的動畫演出吧！
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 俄文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7/8/10/11
  • 處理器: 2 Ghz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 512MB+
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間

data.name: Furry Shades of Gay 3: Still Gayer
data.detailed_description:
🍆If you like guys...and the girls too!🍑


About the Game

Furry Shades of Gay 3: Still Gayer continues the epic saga of furry men loving other furry men with new stories, new characters and other new things!

The sex will get even hotter with new, much longer and more varied animations. All the thrusts and tugs and jerks and stretches are more expressive now and our animators are having an absolute blast with them. And for the first time in the series all the animations will have voice acting and sound effects!

The puzzle engine is getting another upgrade as well. New goals, new obstacles, and new themed levels await you! Plow through all the targets and you’ll get to see your favourite characters plow each other!

Percy and Blake are looking for a love nest to call their own. While on search, they stumble upon an old Victorian mansion and decide to take a closer look. To their surprise, the door has locked behind them, so they have to delve deep into the mystery… Ghosts don’t exist after all, do they?

There are still a few days left from the work trip, and Alex is bored in his room alone. Italy always reminds him of Valentino and the spark that ran between them in college. Well, the phone call is made and Alex is on his way to his own hot Italian adventure.

Hugo is a work procrastination legend. He spends his time chatting with a very hot stranger who just adores his round ass, on his phone. But what happens if his boss William catches him? He's not going to fire Hugo, is he?

Summer is coming to an end, and the shift at the scout camp is ending, too. Connor feels a little sad for the days gone by, and does he… feel something for Dan? But Dan is also a guy... It seems he doesn't seem to care as much as Connor, who is trying to sort himself out.

Millennial Maiki has millennial problems - his back hurts. His masseuse, Adele, unfortunately has a day off, but promises to come up with something to help with his urgent request. And it seems that her “something” is already knocking on Maiki's door to save his tense muscles.

It’s been a while since Evan crossed the threshold of Snake’s Pit BDSM club. His relationship with his Master, Snake, has greatly evolved in the past months, no longer resembling a simple professional bond. Valentine’s Day is coming… Will both of them be able to confess that they have grown to be much closer to each other?

Features

  • Five all new, even gayer stories

  • More than 60 fully original artworks

  • Longer animated sex scenes with sound and voiceovers

  • Branching narrative, hard choices, sloppy rewards

  • Updated Match-3 gameplay with new goals and features

data.short_description: Furry Shades of Gay 3 is a collection of hot novels with choice and match-3 elements! You'll find new stories, new (and old!) characters, and a new, more diverse match-3 experience. Go through all the stories, uncover all the plot options, and unlock 15 hot voiced animations!
data.supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian
*languages with full audio support

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows 7/8/10/11
  • Processor: 2 Ghz Dual Core
  • Memory: 1 GB RAM
  • Graphics: 512MB+
  • Storage: 3 GB available space
